hero.description: Shaping the educators of tomorrow. Master the art of pedagogy, educational psychology, and classroom management through our highly integrated, NCTE-approved teaching programs.

vision.title: Vision
vision.label: Our Purpose
vision.text: To be a center of excellence in teacher education, producing innovative, empathetic, and highly skilled educators who can transform the landscape of modern education and inspire future generations.

mission.title: Mission
mission.label: Our Goal
points: Deliver NCTE-approved, integrated curriculums that combine core subjects (Science/Arts) with advanced teaching methodologies.
Foster practical teaching skills through rigorous internship programs in top-tier schools.
Equip future educators with modern Ed-Tech tools and digital classroom management skills.
Provide intensive mentoring for competitive teaching exams like CTET, State TETs, and KVS/NVS recruitments.

overview.subtitle: What is the B.Sc. + B.Ed. Programme?
paragraphs: The B.Sc. + B.Ed. is a 4-Year Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP) that intelligently blends the rigorous study of Science (Physics, Chemistry, Maths/Biology) with the professional training of a Bachelor of Education. Doing this integrated course saves students one entire academic year compared to pursuing a 3-year B.Sc. followed by a 2-year B.Ed.

Recognized by the NCTE, the curriculum goes far beyond traditional blackboard teaching. Students are heavily trained in modern digital pedagogy, micro-teaching (simulated classrooms), and educational psychology. The program culminates in a rigorous 16-week teaching internship where students actively teach and manage classes in real schools.

scope.body: A B.Sc. + B.Ed. graduate is a dual-threat professional—a master of science and a trained educator. Graduates are fully eligible to apply for high-paying Government Teacher posts like TGT (Trained Graduate Teacher) in Kendriya Vidyalayas (KVS), Navodaya Vidyalayas (NVS), and State Board Schools. Furthermore, the explosion of the Ed-Tech industry has created massive demand for specialized science educators in companies like Byju's, Unacademy, and Allen, offering lucrative corporate salaries to top teachers.
scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in Govt. Schools, Elite Private Institutes, and Ed-Tech

curriculum.subtitle: An integrated NCTE curriculum blending STEM with Pedagogy
curriculum.introNote: The curriculum runs science and education subjects in parallel. The first two years build your science base, while the last two years focus intensely on the art of teaching.
curriculum.outroNote: A mandatory 16-week School Internship and an Action Research Project are required to complete the degree.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure Overview
accordionSections.content: The 4-year B.Sc.+B.Ed program spans 8 semesters. Students select their science group (PCM or CBZ). Alongside their science subjects, they study core education papers like Childhood & Growing Up, Learning & Teaching, and Assessment for Learning. The 7th and 8th semesters are almost entirely practical, focusing on School Internships and Ed-Tech mastery.

accordionSections.title: Year-1: Foundations of Science & Education
accordionSections.content: Mechanics/Diversity of Microbes, Calculus/Cell Biology, Inorganic Chemistry, Childhood and Growing Up, Contemporary India and Education, Language Proficiency, Science Practicals.

accordionSections.title: Year-2: Advanced Science & Psychology
accordionSections.content: Electricity & Magnetism/Plant Ecology, Algebra/Genetics, Organic Chemistry, Learning and Teaching, Knowledge and Curriculum, Yoga & Health Education, Science Practicals.

accordionSections.title: Year-3: Pedagogy & Micro-Teaching
accordionSections.content: Quantum Physics/Molecular Bio, Biochemistry, Pedagogy of Science Subject I, Pedagogy of Science Subject II, Assessment for Learning, Micro-Teaching Workshops (Simulated Teaching).

accordionSections.title: Year-4: Internship & Action Research
accordionSections.content: Gender, School and Society, Creating an Inclusive School, Understanding ICT in Education, 16-Week Mandatory School Internship Program (SIP), Action Research Project.

applySteps.subtitle: Simple 5-step process to join the Integrated B.Ed. programme

items.a: Candidates must have passed 10+2 from a recognized board with a minimum of 50% marks. You MUST be from the Science stream (PCM or PCB). Arts/Commerce students should apply for B.A.+B.Ed.
items.q: What is the eligibility criteria? Can Commerce students apply?

items.a: It is a 4-year integrated degree program divided into 8 semesters. The tuition fee is ₹30,000 per semester.
items.q: What is the duration and fee structure?

items.a: Doing a normal B.Sc. (3 years) + standard B.Ed. (2 years) takes 5 years total. This integrated program merges both, allowing you to complete both degrees in just 4 years, saving time and money.
items.q: Why should I choose 4-Year B.Sc.+B.Ed over a regular B.Ed.?

items.a: Yes! The program is fully approved by the National Council for Teacher Education (NCTE). Upon graduation, you are fully eligible for CTET and all State/Central Government teaching jobs.
items.q: Is this degree approved by the NCTE?

items.a: Graduates are hired as TGT Science/Math teachers in Government Schools (KVS, NVS), premium private schools, and as Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) in corporate Ed-Tech companies.
items.q: What kind of jobs will I get after B.Sc.+B.Ed.?

items.a: Yes, you must complete a rigorous 16-week School Internship Program (SIP) in your final year, where you will actively teach in a recognized school under supervision.
items.q: Is there a mandatory school teaching internship?

items.a: Absolutely. Our syllabus is rigorously mapped to the CTET framework, and we provide extra mentoring sessions specifically for clearing Teacher Eligibility Tests.
items.q: Does the university help in CTET preparation?

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the B.Sc.-B.Ed. programme

roadmap.subtitle: Your journey from a science student to an elite STEM Educator.

years.contentTitle: Foundations of Science and Child Development
years.contentDesc: The first year builds your core scientific knowledge while introducing you to the psychology of how children learn and grow.
subjects: Core Science Subject I, II & III

years.contentDesc: Deepen your science mastery and begin understanding how to structure a curriculum and assess student learning effectively.
This year transitions heavily into practical teaching. You will specialize in the pedagogy of your specific science subjects and practice in Micro-Teaching studios.
The final year is defined by a massive 16-week School Internship where you act as a full-time teacher, preparing you for immediate employment.

list.name: Neha Agarwal

list.name: Aman Gupta
list.text: The focus on Ed-Tech tools and digital teaching methodologies gave me a massive advantage in securing a high-paying role as a Subject Matter Expert at Unacademy.

list.name: Priya Sharma
list.text: The 16-week mandatory school internship was an incredible experience. It transformed my theoretical knowledge of educational psychology into practical classroom management.

overview.subtitle: What is the B.A. + B.Ed. Programme?
paragraphs: The B.A. + B.Ed. is a 4-Year Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP) that merges a Bachelor of Arts with a Bachelor of Education. This course saves students one entire academic year compared to the traditional route (3-year B.A. + 2-year B.Ed.) and is specifically designed for students who want to become expert teachers in Social Sciences, History, Languages, and Political Science.

Recognized by the NCTE, the curriculum balances deep subject knowledge with the psychology of learning. Students undergo heavy training in micro-teaching (simulated classrooms), digital pedagogy, and curriculum design. The degree culminates in a rigorous 16-week school internship where students independently manage real classrooms.

scope.body: A B.A. + B.Ed. graduate is highly qualified to teach Arts and Humanities across the country. Graduates are immediately eligible to sit for central and state-level exams to secure high-paying Government Teacher posts (TGT) in Kendriya Vidyalayas (KVS), Navodaya Vidyalayas (NVS), and DSSSB schools. Beyond traditional schools, massive demand exists in the Ed-Tech sector (Unacademy, Vedantu) for Subject Matter Experts, Content Developers, and online educators in Social Sciences and Languages.
scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in Govt. Schools, Premium Institutes, and Ed-Tech

curriculum.subtitle: An integrated NCTE curriculum blending Arts with Pedagogy
curriculum.introNote: The curriculum runs humanities and education subjects in parallel. The first two years build your core arts base, while the last two years focus intensely on the art of teaching.
curriculum.outroNote: A mandatory 16-week School Internship and an Action Research Project are required to complete the degree.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure Overview
accordionSections.content: The 4-year B.A.+B.Ed program spans 8 semesters. Students select three core Arts subjects (e.g., History, Political Science, Geography, or English Literature). Alongside these, they study core education papers like Childhood & Growing Up, Learning & Teaching, and Assessment for Learning. The 7th and 8th semesters are highly practical, focusing on School Internships and Ed-Tech mastery.

accordionSections.title: Year-1: Foundations of Arts & Education
accordionSections.content: Core Arts Subject I (e.g., History), Core Arts Subject II (e.g., Pol. Science), Core Arts Subject III, Childhood and Growing Up, Contemporary India and Education, Language Proficiency.

accordionSections.title: Year-2: Advanced Humanities & Psychology
accordionSections.content: Advanced Core Arts Subjects I, II & III, Learning and Teaching, Knowledge and Curriculum, Yoga & Health Education, Environmental Studies.

accordionSections.title: Year-3: Pedagogy & Micro-Teaching
accordionSections.content: Final Core Arts Subjects, Pedagogy of Social Science Subject I, Pedagogy of Language Subject II, Assessment for Learning, Micro-Teaching Workshops (Simulated Teaching).

accordionSections.title: Year-4: Internship & Action Research
accordionSections.content: Gender, School and Society, Creating an Inclusive School, Understanding ICT in Education, 16-Week Mandatory School Internship Program (SIP), Action Research Project.

placements.label: Placement Records
placements.subtitle: Outstanding placements across Kendriya Vidyalayas, Premium Private Schools, and leading Ed-Tech platforms like Byju's and Unacademy.

community.label: Community Action
description: The School of Education is built on the philosophy of experiential learning. Our students actively engage in micro-teaching sessions, lesson planning workshops, and educational psychology seminars.

Through mandatory school internships and rural teaching camps, students gain first-hand experience in managing real classrooms, understanding diverse student needs, and deploying modern educational technologies.

list.title: Micro-Teaching Studios
list.desc: Specially designed rooms with AV recording capabilities where students practice teaching and receive immediate peer and faculty feedback.

list.title: Educational Psychology Lab
list.desc: Equipped with standardized psychological tests, aptitude scales, and personality assessments to understand student behavior.

list.title: Curriculum & Language Lab
list.desc: A digital lab focusing on linguistic proficiency, phonetics, and modern curriculum design software.

list.title: Ed-Tech & Smart Classrooms
list.desc: Training centers where students learn to use interactive whiteboards, digital podiums, and modern LMS software.
